failures.description: No failure occurred in the provided trajectory.
failures.checklist_reasoning: No root-cause failure is identifiable. The agent followed the required plan: it prepared the ProductCatalogSearch call, invoked it with available_only=true, color=black, product_type=Smartphone, then used the returned evidence to filter by price > 1143.42. The tool returned two available black smartphones, and only item 1507389580 at $1157.86 exceeded $1143.42. The final answer matches that evidence.
